info.title: Caplets HTTP API
info.description: Canonical public non-MCP HTTP contract for Caplets.

bearerAuth.description: Operator or Access Client bearer credential, according to route policy.

manifest.description: JSON bundle manifest. This part must be first.

file.description: Repeated bundle files in manifest order.

101.description: Switching Protocols response. The server always negotiates `caplets.project-binding.v1`. OpenAPI does not model WebSocket sequencing; `ProjectBindingSocketClientMessage` and `ProjectBindingSocketServerMessage` are the authoritative payload components.

400.description: Legacy Project Binding v1 JSON error envelope.

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer credential.

403.description: Insufficient role or rejected Project Binding session.

409.description: Legacy Project Binding v1 JSON error envelope.

426.description: HTTP probe response when a WebSocket upgrade was not requested.

post.description: Deprecated compatibility adapter. The accepted command set is frozen; local init/add commands are rejected by policy.

200.description: Legacy success or safe error envelope.
